subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-12-19 in London
subcodes.first_line: Women must educate themselves and strive to acquire virtues. Moreover, they must win their rights through education
subcodes.first_line_orig: باید نساء در تربیت خود و تحصیل کمالات بکوشند بتربیت احقاق حقوق خویش نمایند
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @wisdom [hikmat], @equality of men and women
